dialogues.text: I forgot my wallet. Can you cover me? Just $6.
dialogues.yes_response: You're the sweetest. I'll make it up to you.

dialogues.text: Can you pick up flowers for my mom's birthday on the way? I'll give you $8.
dialogues.yes_response: Yellow ones if they have them. Thank you!
dialogues.no_response: I guess I'll order something online then.

dialogues.text: I left my card at home and I'm $4 short for lunch.
dialogues.yes_response: Thank you babe. You always save me.
dialogues.no_response: I'll just... skip lunch I guess.

dialogues.text: Come with me to my sister's place to help set up the furniture? $9 for your time.
dialogues.yes_response: She's been waiting for that wardrobe. Let's go.
dialogues.no_response: Fine. I'll struggle alone with a wardrobe.

dialogues.text: My friend needs $5 and I don't have cash. Can I give her yours?
dialogues.yes_response: You're so generous. I'll add it to the tab.

dialogues.text: Can you go return this dress for me? I hate doing returns. $7.
dialogues.yes_response: Just say it was too small. Here's the receipt.

dialogues.text: We're $3 short for the tip at dinner.
dialogues.yes_response: We're not those people. Thank you.
dialogues.no_response: Then we are those people apparently.

dialogues.text: Can you wait in line at the bakery while I park? I'll give you $5.
dialogues.yes_response: Order the croissants. I'll be two minutes.
dialogues.no_response: The croissants will be gone. You know that right.

dialogues.text: I'm $10 short for the gift I already bought.
dialogues.yes_response: I'll transfer it to you tonight. Promise.
dialogues.no_response: I guess I return part of it.

dialogues.text: Help me wrap all these presents? $6 and hot chocolate.
dialogues.yes_response: You're actually wonderful. Tape's on the table.
